# Daniel Whiteside

Software Engineer & Independent Consultant based in the United States.

## About

Daniel Whiteside is a software engineer, project manager, and solutions architect. He works as an independent consultant and is the founder of Wharfinger, an asset management application. His background spans full-stack development, data analytics, AI integration, and enterprise software.

He is a former Project Lead and Solutions Engineer at Zoho, where he delivered enterprise solutions for high-value clients and spoke at technology events.

## Skills & Expertise

- **Zoho**: Zoho CRM, Zoho ecosystem development, enterprise Zoho implementations
- **Development**: JavaScript, Node.js, Python, SQL, REST APIs, React, HTML/CSS
- **Cloud & Infrastructure**: AWS, DigitalOcean
- **AI/ML**: AI integration, ML strategy and implementation
- **Leadership**: Team facilitation, stakeholder engagement, 500+ hours of training in psychology, communication, and leadership
- **Project Management**: Agile, Scrum, solutions architecture

## Certifications

- Certified ScrumMaster (CSM)
- CompTIA Data+
- CAPM (Certified Associate in Project Management)

## Projects

- **Wharfinger** — Asset management application (staging.wharfinger.app)
